ab: qanengi iku meliway tu kelisiw timaisuan ni?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: qanengi ti! ngid isu tu qatani kelisiw?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: kalingun ti iku mazas tu kelisiw, qanengi iku meliway tu kelisiw timaisuan ni?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: mai iku mazas tu kelisiw qaya ye!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: kalingun ti iku mazas tu kelisiw, qanengi iku meliway tu kelisiw timaisuan ni?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: qasukaw, ta ngayaw niliwayan su mai pama patadikud timaikuan.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: qanengi iku meliway tu qudus su ni?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: kua, aisu pa mala.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: qanengi iku meliway tu sudad su ni?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: paliwayan ku ti ti pipisan.
en: B: I lent it to Pipis.

ab: paliway iku tu zitinsia su qanengi ni?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: nengi ti, wanayka temawaR patadikud iku ti.
ch: B: 好啊，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: muzan ti. mai iku siqawsua, paliway iku tu qawsua qanengi ni?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: ussiq ma qawsua ku, qatapun pa ita siqawsua!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐!
en: B: I only have one umbrella, we're all in this together!

ab: nipaliwayan su timaikuan sudad zau, patadikud aka isu.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: ngid pama isu tayta tu niana sudad qanengi semanu timaikuan.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: qumni ti iku patadikud tu kelisiw su?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: quni, yau ti kelisiw su qawka patadikud.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再還。
en: B: It's okay, you can pay it back when you have the money.

ab: qumni ti isu patadikud tu kelisiw ku?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: temawaR patadikud iku timaisuan.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: qumni ti isu patadikud tu sudad ku?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: siRab ussa patadikudan ku ti isu ni?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: bilu zau nipaliwayan na isu ni buya ni?
en: A: Did Buya lend you this pencil?

ab: maqezaq, setangi deddan niliwayan ku timaizipana.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: niliwayan su ti buyan bilu zau ni?
ch: A:這支鉛筆是你跟Buya借的嗎?
en: A: Did you borrow this pencil from Buya?

ab: ussa, niRasan na tina ku zau.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: mai ti tu miyan, qatiw ka ti ipayan liway tu kiya miyan.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's go borrow some from Ipay.

ab: kuwa, qatiw pa iku liway.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: qatiw ika semanu ti ipay patadikud tu kelisiw ku.
en: B: Go and ask Ipay to pay me back.

ab: utani kelisiw niliwayan na timaisuan?
en: A: How much did she borrow from you?
